title: Why Mu°awiyah appointed 'Abd al-Rahman b. Ziyad as governor of Khurasan
description: Why Mu°awiyah appointed 'Abd al-Rahman b. Ziyad as governor of Khurasan. Recorded under the year 58 AH (678–679 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 18.
